# Carlos Paramio - Software & Cloud Architect

Personal portfolio website showcasing 20+ years of experience in software architecture, cloud infrastructure, and technical leadership.

**Website**: https://carlosparamio.com  
**Location**: Remote (since 2008)  
**Languages**: English, Spanish

## Professional Background

- **Current Role**: Director of Technology at Avallain
- **Focus**: AI-powered educational platforms serving millions of learners
- **Specialties**: AWS cloud architecture, system design, technical leadership
- **Industries**: EdTech, SaaS, Web Development

## Certifications

- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
- AWS Certified AI Practitioner

## Pages

- **Home**: Hero with services and testimonials
- **About/Background**: Bio, certifications, full testimonials
- **Projects**: Avallain products and past projects
- **Open Source**: Ruby gems and community contributions
- **Publications**: Books and technical articles
- **Talks**: Conference presentations by year
- **Retro**: ZX Spectrum games (PAWS format) - playable in browser

## Technical Stack

- Astro 5.x (static site generator)
- Vanilla CSS with custom properties
- No JavaScript frameworks
- View Transitions API for page navigation

## Design Philosophy

Earth tones palette reflecting eco-conscious approach to technology:
- Scalable, efficient systems = lower energy consumption
- Professional but approachable aesthetic
- Quality content over decorative elements

## Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/carlosparamio
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/carlosparamio
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/carlosparamio
